# Electrical Wiring Diagram and Terminal Definition: Interpreting Manufacturer Wiring Schematics for Field Installation

## 适用受众
Subcontractor

## 写作角度说明
电气接线图与端子定义是电气分包商理解和使用设备厂家提供的电气接线图进行现场接线的核心参考文件。本模块帮助分包商正确理解图纸中的端子定义、电缆规格和接线要求，避免接线错误。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Terminating wires based on wire color coding alone — without referencing the terminal assignment table — risks wiring errors because the same color wire may serve different functions across different circuit groups in a biosafety equipment panel.

## 参考素材
- Wiring diagram sections: power distribution → control circuits → interlock circuits → BMS communication → alarm and indication → grounding
- Terminal block identification: X1 = mains power input (L1, L2, L3, N, PE) → X2 = control voltage input → X3 = field device inputs (door position, pressure switch, emergency stop) → X4 = output signals (solenoid valves, indicator lamps) → X5 = BMS communication terminals → X6 = ground bus
- Cable type requirements: power cables: 3-core or 5-core shielded cable, cross-section per load → control cables: shielded twisted pair (for analog signals) or multi-pair cable (for digital signals) → BMS cable: Cat6 FTP or as specified by BMS contractor
- Wire sizing: follow voltage drop calculation (maximum 3% voltage drop for control circuits) → use cable sizing table based on current and installation method → size grounding conductor per applicable standard
- Drawing revision control: verify drawing revision number matches project requirement → annotate any field modifications on as-built drawings → update revision number when changes are made

## 关键词
Wiring Diagram, Terminal Definition, Circuit Identification, Field Wiring, Cable Sizing, Electrical Drawing
